gold.title: Display Cards
gold.reason: 7864 downloads, 91 likes — stacked skewed cards with grayscale-to-color hover transition; visually stunning and instantly production-ready for any SaaS hero or feature section.

gold.title: Feature Section With Hover Effects
gold.reason: 7927 downloads, 80 likes — 4×2 icon feature grid with animated left-border accent on hover; clean, polished, and universally applicable to any SaaS landing page.

gold.title: Bento Grid
gold.reason: 8396 downloads, 97 likes — highest-rated component in the set; BentoGrid + BentoCard primitives with hover-reveal CTAs and full dark-mode support.

gold.title: Feature Section
gold.reason: 4376 downloads, 64 likes — auto-advancing step-by-step carousel with progress bar and image swap; polished interactive pattern that wows customers.

gold.title: Features 5
gold.reason: Two-column layout with bullet feature list left and product screenshot right — clean, business-grade, easy to populate with real content.

gold.title: Features 9
gold.reason: Dotted SVG world map + real-time chat mockup + Recharts area chart in one section — comprehensive dashboard-brand visual that immediately signals global reach.

gold.title: Features 11
gold.reason: 5-panel bento grid with app mockups and integration logos — visually rich and directly usable for SaaS product pages.

gold.title: Combined Featured Section
gold.reason: 4-quadrant bento combining map, case study, Recharts chart, and feature cards — most comprehensive single-section component in the set.

gold.title: Feature 108
gold.reason: 2065 downloads, 17 likes — tabbed feature section with badge, heading, description and image per tab; clean, flexible, and universally applicable.

gold.title: Accordion Feature Section
gold.reason: 584 downloads, 9 likes — accordion on left with live image preview on right; a proven SaaS pattern with excellent interactivity and professional polish.

gold.title: Feature Section with Bento Grid
gold.reason: 1534 downloads, 23 likes — clean bento grid with col-span variation, immediately usable as a features section for any product website.

gold.title: Pricing Section with Comparison
gold.reason: 883 downloads, 15 likes — 3-tier pricing table with feature comparison grid; a must-have section for SaaS and subscription businesses.

gold.title: Sticky Scroll Cards Section
gold.reason: Sticky stacking feature cards driven by IntersectionObserver — compelling scroll-driven narrative ideal for product storytelling sections.

gold.title: Features
gold.reason: 348 downloads — reusable auto-advancing feature showcase with progress indicator, image carousel, and icon support; highly configurable via props.

gold.title: Featured Image Section
gold.reason: Tabbed feature section with animated border highlight on active tab and smooth background-position morph on a product screenshot — polished and interactive.

gold.title: Feature Section With Bento Grid
gold.reason: 968 downloads, 19 likes — full feature section with globe (cobe), image carousel with tilt, and YouTube thumbnail skeleton — visually impressive for SaaS.

gold.title: Featured CRM Demo Section
gold.reason: Hero with video thumbnail play, 4 mini feature cards, and 8 integration logos — a comprehensive section that covers social proof and key USPs in one block.

gold.title: Features 7
gold.reason: Full-width email app screenshot with 3D perspective transform (skew+rotateX) plus 3 feature columns — dynamic visual depth that makes product screenshots pop.

silver.title: Feature Carousel
silver.reason: Auto-playing animated feature carousel with spring-physics pill navigation and card image stack — polished but requires significant content customization.

silver.title: Card Spotlight
silver.reason: 1233 downloads, 17 likes — mouse-tracking spotlight card using Three.js CanvasRevealEffect; visually impressive but better as a building block than a full section.

silver.title: Bento Grid
silver.reason: 2647 downloads, 40 likes — clean bento grid with tags, status badges, and dot pattern hover effects; slightly less opinionated than aceternity bento.

silver.title: Case Studies
silver.reason: Testimonial quotes with images and animated react-countup metrics — solid social proof section, slightly limited by its case-study-specific framing.

silver.title: Case Study 5
silver.reason: 152 downloads — featured case study card plus 2 smaller cards with hover effects and dot pattern accents; clean but niche to companies with case studies to show.

silver.title: Gallery 6
silver.reason: 768 downloads, 5 likes — full-width Embla carousel of image+text cards with prev/next controls; versatile for blog, portfolio, or case study sections.

silver.title: Feature Section with Grid
silver.reason: 781 downloads, 5 likes — 6-item feature grid with image placeholder + title + description; minimal but widely usable as a quick features section.

silver.title: Feature with Advantages
silver.reason: 858 downloads, 10 likes — checkmark advantage grid with badge and heading; clean and universally applicable, though slightly plain without imagery.

silver.title: Feature
silver.reason: 666 downloads, 9 likes — bordered two-column layout with checklist left and image placeholder right; solid structure but minimal visual polish.

silver.title: Feature with Image Carousel
silver.reason: 542 downloads, 9 likes — two-column layout with text left and Embla carousel right; good pattern for showcasing product screenshots.

silver.title: Feature with Image
silver.reason: 443 downloads, 3 likes — simple two-column image+text layout with badge; useful as a structural building block but needs styling work.

silver.title: Features 1
silver.reason: 3-column feature cards with radial masked grid decorator areas — clean, professional, works for SaaS but icon treatment is slightly niche.

silver.title: Features 3
silver.reason: Single horizontal card with feature dividers — compact layout good for secondary feature sections, slightly simple compared to Gold.

silver.title: Features 4
silver.reason: 6-cell border grid (2×3) with icon, title, description — solid icon-grid pattern used widely on SaaS sites.

silver.title: Features 6
silver.reason: Full-width email app screenshot plus 4 feature columns below — good structure but same-image scenario limits reusability versus Features 7.

silver.title: Feature Section With Card Gradient
silver.reason: 687 downloads, 9 likes — 4×2 feature cards with gradient + SVG grid background; polished but slightly dark-themed and gradient-heavy for general use.

silver.title: Feature 72
silver.reason: 53 downloads — 2×2 feature card grid with 16:9 images, title, description, and a sidebar CTA; clean image-based feature grid.

silver.title: Feature 73
silver.reason: 46 downloads — featured large card (col-span-2) with smaller cards below; good visual hierarchy for highlighting a key feature.

silver.title: Globe Feature Section
silver.reason: 101 downloads — two-column CTA left + animated interactive cobe globe right; eye-catching for global-reach messaging, though globe is now a common pattern.

silver.title: Features 10
silver.reason: 2-card bento with map image, calendar, and circular pattern — decent visual variety but less comprehensive than 11-panel bento.

silver.title: Ruixen Feature Section
silver.reason: Auto-cycling testimonial card stack + integration list + stats grid; comprehensive but only ships 2 integrations and all content is brand-specific.

silver.title: Bento Pricing
silver.reason: 158 downloads — pricing table in bento grid layout with featured plan, feature checklists, and subscribe CTAs; useful for SaaS pricing pages.

silver.title: Card
silver.reason: 827 downloads, 17 likes — multi-variant card with 8 design patterns (dots, gradient, neubrutalism, etc.); valuable building block for customizing section cards.

silver.title: Section with Mockup
silver.reason: Two-column hero with layered parallax card mockup stack (primary+secondary); good for SaaS product screenshots but requires real product images.

silver.title: Bounce Card Features
silver.reason: 162 downloads — 4 bento-style framer-motion cards with gradient reveal panels on hover; fun interactive layout for feature showcases.

silver.title: Animated Feature Carousel
silver.reason: Auto-cycling 4-step feature carousel with framer-motion transitions; solid pattern but uses placeholder images and lacks the polish of Gold tier carousels.

silver.title: FAQ 5
silver.reason: 206 downloads — numbered FAQ list with badge and center-aligned layout; clean and immediately usable for any SaaS FAQ section.

silver.title: Changelog 1
silver.reason: 113 downloads — sticky-scroll changelog with version badges, dates, bullet items, and images; useful for SaaS product update pages.

silver.title: Featured Section Stats
silver.reason: Stats grid (4 metrics) plus Recharts area chart below heading; clean analytics-brand section but simple compared to ruixen-stats.

silver.title: Features Detail
silver.reason: GSAP scroll-triggered hero with auto-sliding dashboard screenshot carousel; engaging but requires GSAP dependency and all screenshots use same placeholder image.

silver.title: Ruixen Stats
silver.reason: CountUp hero number overlaid on Recharts area chart with floating stats sidebar; visually distinctive layout for analytics/dashboard SaaS branding.

silver.title: Grid Feature Cards
silver.reason: 1023 downloads — minimal icon+text feature cards with randomized SVG grid pattern highlights; clean primitive for building custom feature sections.

silver.title: Text Parallax Content Scroll
silver.reason: 249 downloads — sticky image sections with parallax text overlays using framer-motion; compelling storytelling pattern for brand/about pages.

silver.title: Feature 2
silver.reason: 50 downloads — clean image-left, text+buttons-right two-column section; the most basic useful layout, good as a starting point.

silver.title: Feature Carousel
silver.reason: 4-step feature showcase with animated step images and mouse-tracking gradient; polished but fixed to 4 steps and narrower in scope than full carousel sections.

silver.title: Hero 195 1
silver.reason: Card-based hero/feature section using border-beam and tracing-beam effects — functional and usable but generic description suggests mid-tier quality.

bronze.title: Card with Cross Pattern
bronze.reason: Pure building block — a card wrapper with a cross/X pattern background; no standalone value as a marketing section.

bronze.title: Card with Ellipsis Pattern
bronze.reason: Building block card wrapper with ellipsis dot pattern; too primitive to be a standalone marketing section.

bronze.title: Card with Grid Ellipsis Pattern
bronze.reason: 614 downloads — grid+dot intersection pattern card wrapper; decorative building block, not a complete feature section.

bronze.title: Card with Grid Pattern
bronze.reason: Grid pattern card wrapper; decorative building block only.

bronze.title: Card with Lines Pattern
bronze.reason: Diagonal lines pattern card wrapper; decorative building block only.

bronze.title: Card with Noise Pattern
bronze.reason: Noise texture dark-only card wrapper; limited to dark-mode-only use and is a decorative building block.

bronze.title: CPU Architecture
bronze.reason: SVG CPU circuit diagram with animated light orbs — too technical/niche, only relevant for hardware or developer-infrastructure products.

bronze.title: Database with REST API
bronze.reason: Animated database + REST API visualization — niche technical illustration only useful for API/backend SaaS products.

bronze.title: Direction Aware Hover
bronze.reason: Direction-aware hover effect on image cards using atan2 — a micro-interaction building block, not a standalone feature section.

bronze.title: Evervault Card
bronze.reason: 1337 downloads, 52 likes — encrypted random-string reveal with radial gradient; visually impressive but too gimmicky for most customer website redesigns.

bronze.title: Glowing Background Stars Card
bronze.reason: Dark card with randomized pulsing glowing star dots — a decorative effect building block, not a complete feature section.

bronze.title: Blog Posts
bronze.reason: 6 downloads — hero-style blog post image grid with star ratings; misnamed as features and very niche to blog-only sites.

bronze.title: Cybernetic Bento Grid
bronze.reason: 13 downloads — dark cyberpunk bento grid with raw CSS and no TypeScript types; low quality and too niche for general SaaS websites.

bronze.title: Sparkles Text
bronze.reason: 3929 downloads, 39 likes — animated sparkle stars around text; a visual decoration effect, not a feature section — needs to be embedded in other layouts.

bronze.title: Pricing Card with Features
bronze.reason: Single fixed-width (464px) pricing card — too narrow and specific; not a full pricing section and hardcoded dimensions limit responsiveness.

bronze.title: Animated Background
bronze.reason: Animated sliding background highlight for tab/nav selection states — a UI micro-interaction component, not a marketing section.

bronze.title: Radial Orbital Timeline
bronze.reason: 4125 downloads — full-screen orbital rotating timeline with expandable nodes; too exotic and complex for typical customer marketing websites.

bronze.title: A Modern Hero Section
bronze.reason: Basic hero with random pixel grid pattern and no animation framework; low visual impact and minimal quality compared to other hero sections.

bronze.title: Features 2
bronze.reason: Muted background variant of features-1 with radial masked grid icons; near-identical to features-1 and the muted palette reduces visual impact.

bronze.title: Features 8
bronze.reason: Unreadable due to file size; based on the meschacirung series pattern, likely a variant of the existing section types — assigned Bronze due to inability to verify quality.

bronze.title: Features (CRM Table)
bronze.reason: Misnamed — actually a customer revenue data table (CRM-style), not a marketing features block; wrong category for redesign use.

bronze.title: 3D Orbit Gallery
bronze.reason: Three.js 3D sphere with orbiting images — experimental and heavy; requires react-three/fiber, too exotic for typical customer website redesigns.

bronze.title: AI Models Preview
bronze.reason: AI model grid with filterable modal — very niche to AI platforms, not applicable to general business/SaaS redesigns.

bronze.title: Crypto Swap Card
bronze.reason: Full crypto token swap UI with live CoinGecko pricing — crypto-only niche, useless for general marketing website redesigns.

bronze.title: Feature Shader Cards
bronze.reason: 6 WebGL shader-background feature cards using @paper-design/shaders-react — exotic/experimental dependency, high visual interest but too heavy and niche.

bronze.title: Feature
bronze.reason: 3-column animated feature cards (typography scaler, layout animator, speed indicator) with all three demos being abstract meta-animations about the UI library itself.

bronze.title: Hero Section with Smooth BG Shader
bronze.reason: Animated MeshGradient shader hero — requires @paper-design/shaders-react, too exotic and performance-heavy for typical customer websites.

bronze.title: Feature Highlight
bronze.reason: Staggered animation feature list component — a building block with animation primitives, not a complete feature section.

bronze.title: Feature Accordion Section
bronze.reason: 6 downloads — accordion with feature image expand; very low adoption and similar in concept to shadcnblockscom accordion-feature-section which is higher quality.

bronze.title: Feature Section
bronze.reason: Scrolling task ticker animation with text/badge content — too abstract and ticker-specific; not a general-purpose feature section.

bronze.title: Multi Orbit Semi Circle
bronze.reason: Three concentric semi-circle orbits with app integration icons — visually interesting but niche integrations visualization, not a general feature showcase.

bronze.title: Rotating Gradient Right
bronze.reason: Spinning conic gradient glow behind a progress card — decorative effect component, the CTA section is thin and specific to the Ruixen UI brand.

bronze.title: Accordion
bronze.reason: 71 downloads — single accordion component with icon row items; a UI primitive, not a full feature section, and misnamed for this category.

bronze.title: Ruixen Bento Cards
bronze.reason: 105 downloads — dashed-border bento with plus-corner icons; all content is Ruixen UI brand-specific and every card links to ruixen.com, limiting reusability.

bronze.title: Safari
bronze.reason: 31 downloads — macOS browser window mockup component; a UI wrapper building block, not a standalone feature section.

bronze.title: Zoom Parallax
bronze.reason: 24 downloads — 7-image scroll-zoom parallax with differential scaling; a visual effect primitive, not a complete feature section with messaging.

bronze.title: Modern Animated Multi Words
bronze.reason: 43 downloads — cycling word animation in a gradient pill container; a text effect component only, needs to be embedded in a larger layout.

bronze.title: Category List
bronze.reason: 38 downloads — interactive list with hover expand; more of a navigation/index component than a features marketing section.

bronze.title: Liquid Radio
bronze.reason: 176 downloads — just an SVG filter definition (GlassFilter) for a liquid glass radio button effect; not a feature section at all.

bronze.title: Neon RGB Text Effect
bronze.reason: 66 downloads — WebGL canvas rendering RGB channel-split neon text; a visual effect demonstration, not a reusable feature section.
